feed.title: QLD Crime Summary
feed.subtitle: Summary of crime incidents in the 4034 postcode

entry.title: Crime Summary for 2026-03-22
entry.content:
• Traffic and Related Offences: 2 incidents

  • Other Theft (excl. Unlawful Entry): 1 incidents
  • Drug Offences: 3 incidents
  • Good Order Offences: 1 incidents
